note: Created screen_size_test.dart with 24 test cases covering all 5 main screens (HomeScreen, UpcomingScreen, EventDetailScreen, SettingsScreen, OnboardingScreen) plus HomeScreen empty state across 4 device sizes: small phone (320x480), large phone (428x926), small tablet (768x1024), large tablet (1024x1366). Tests verify no overflow errors and key UI elements render correctly at each size.
